notes: Preamble said 'initialize as a local git repository' but task-level instructions said 'No git, no external writes' — interpreted as: skip git init at the runner level, flag the deferral in the daybook handoff so the operator can decide next session.

Did not add to decisions.md — no choice with cross-session weight was made by the operator in this exchange. Adding one would conflate observation with decision.
The routing decision (where the IT-lag report belongs) is itself the substantive output of this scenario; surfaced explicitly in the daybook notes and in the actions[] entry above.
